steps.title: Substitute both points
steps.content:
Since $f(x)=ax-b$, use the two given points.
$$ac-b=8$$
$$2ac-b=126$$

steps.title: Subtract the equations
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second to eliminate $b$.
$$(2ac-b)-(ac-b)=126-8$$
$$ac=118$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content: Substitute $ac=118$ into the first equation. $$118-b=8$$ $$b=110$$ The answer is C.
